fetchngs.description: Small pipeline (4 nf-core + 6 local modules). Legacy template — no nf-schema, no RO-Crate. Tests skill against pre-3.0 conventions.

funcscan.description: Medium pipeline (42 nf-core + 6 local modules). Template 3.3.2 — has RO-Crate and nf-schema, but flat local modules and no topic versions.

rnaseq.description: Large pipeline (71 nf-core + 5 local + 25 subworkflows). Template 3.5.2 — current gold standard with topic-based versions.
